data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Download event tracking (success/failure/device/IP metadata)', but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality has been implemented or tested. The linked use case mentions the need for download event tracking, yet none of the prior steps include API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is covered. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to assert that this requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of download event tracking being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for download event tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that download events are logged with success/failure/device/IP metadata.
